hypotheses_results.hypothesis: H1: The new design increases average session duration by at least 15%
hypotheses_results.explanation: Session duration increased by 13.5% (185 to 210 seconds), which is below the 15% threshold. While statistically significant, it does not meet the specified minimum improvement.

hypotheses_results.hypothesis: H2: The new design improves conversion rate
hypotheses_results.explanation: Conversion rate improved from 3.2% to 4.1%, a 28% relative increase. Chi-square test of proportions confirms statistical significance.

hypotheses_results.hypothesis: H3: The new design reduces bounce rate
hypotheses_results.explanation: Bounce rate decreased from 45% to 38%, a 15.6% relative reduction. Chi-square test confirms significance.
